_meta.description: Add a new user to Okta admin console. Navigates to /admin/users, clicks Add person, fills the form (first name, last name, username/login, primary email), and submits.

auth.note: Okta OAuth PKCE — session must already be active.

first_name.description: First name of the new user

last_name.description: Last name of the new user

email.description: Email address — used as both username (login) and primary email
email.hint: Must be a valid email address. For org users: firstname.lastname@embeddedsystemsresearch.org

_meta.note_params: IMPORTANT: {{base_url}} in chain steps is resolved from API-call params, NOT from payload.params. When calling via /run directly, pass params={"base_url": "https://trial-8689388-admin.okta.com"} explicitly, OR use the hardcoded URL (chains already use hardcoded URL as of this version).

okta-first-name.description: First name input in Add Person form
okta-first-name.resolveHint: Input field labeled 'First name' inside the Add Person dialog. Uses name attribute.

okta-last-name.description: Last name input in Add Person form
okta-last-name.resolveHint: Input field labeled 'Last name' inside the Add Person dialog.

okta-username.description: Username input (must be email format) in Add Person form
okta-username.resolveHint: Input labeled 'Username' — Okta requires email format.

okta-primary-email.description: Primary email input in Add Person form
okta-primary-email.resolveHint: Input labeled 'Primary email'. Usually same value as username.

okta-save-button.description: Save/submit button in Add Person form
okta-save-button.resolveHint: Submit button inside the Add Person dialog. May be labeled 'Save' or 'Save User'.

chain.note: Navigate to Okta admin users page
Wait for MUI table to load
Snapshot page before clicking Add person — confirm we see the link [FIXED: was read, changed to perceive — Okta SPA requires perceive]
Click the 'Add person' link to open the Add Person dialog
Wait for the Add Person dialog/form to render
Type username (email format required by Okta)
Click Save to create the user
Confirm result — should be on user profile page or back on users list [FIXED: was read, changed to perceive — Okta SPA requires perceive]
